# Documentation Status

## Core docs updated

## Documentation rules

- If a feature is present, it must build or be verifiably guarded by env checks.
- If a workflow references a file or route, that file or route must exist.
- If onboarding behavior changes, both the skill instructions and README/setup docs must be updated together.
